umum.gagal: Something went wrong. Please try again.

landing.hero_subjudul: Say goodbye to party planning stress. From stunning digital invitations to effortless guest management, let's create an event they'll talk about for years.
landing.fitur_subjudul: Because a 5th and a 25th birthday require completely different kinds of magic.
landing.mode_anak_desc: Playful themes, allergy tracking, drop-off confirmation, toy gift registry
landing.mode_dewasa_desc: Elegant, with advanced budget tracking and dress code management.
landing.langkah_1_desc: Kids birthday or adult party — each mode has tailored features.
landing.langkah_2_desc: Choose from our stunning collection of premium animated themes.
landing.langkah_3_desc: Share your unique invite link via WhatsApp in seconds.
landing.langkah_4_desc: See guest confirmations update in real-time on your dashboard.
landing.harga_subjudul: Your account is free forever. Only pay per-event when you need exclusive VIP features.
landing.fitur_anak_1_desc: Automated alert system for guests with food allergies or dietary restrictions.
landing.fitur_anak_2_desc: Easily track whether parents are staying or dropping off their children.
landing.fitur_anak_3_desc: Integrate gift lists from favorite toy stores to avoid duplicate gifts.
landing.fitur_anak_4_desc: Fun animated invitation themes like Dinosaurs, Space, and Unicorns.
landing.fitur_dewasa_1_desc: Manage venue expenses and automatically calculate beverage needs.
landing.fitur_dewasa_2_desc: Elegantly convey dress code instructions directly on the invitation.
landing.fitur_dewasa_3_desc: Hashtag generator and Instagram Story assets for guests to share.
landing.fitur_dewasa_4_desc: Premium invitations with a virtual envelope opening effect.
landing.testimoni_1_text: Glyka PartyBox made preparing for Alisha's party super easy! The digital invite is so cool, everyone asked where I made it 😍
landing.testimoni_2_text: The adult invitation looks so elegant, like a luxury brand invite. All the guests were amazed!
landing.testimoni_3_text: The allergy tracking feature is a lifesaver! We had 3 guests with peanut allergies and we didn't miss it.
landing.testimoni_4_text: The budget tracker is awesome. I could control my party expenses perfectly. Highly recommended!
landing.faq_1_a: Yes! Glyka PartyBox is fully available in English and Indonesian. You can switch languages anytime.
landing.faq_2_q: What's the difference between Kids and Adult modes?
landing.faq_2_a: Kids mode focuses on allergy tracking, drop-offs, gift registries. Adult mode focuses on budgets, bar planning, and dress codes.
landing.faq_3_q: Can the digital invitations be opened on phones?
landing.faq_3_a: Yes! Invitation links are optimized for all devices — phones, tablets, and computers.
landing.faq_4_q: How do I share the invitations?
landing.faq_4_a: After creating your invitation, you get a unique link to share via WhatsApp or email.
landing.faq_5_a: Yes, all data is securely stored with encryption. Only you can view your guests' data.
landing.marquee_text: GLYKA PartyBox ✨ ULTIMATE CELEBRATION 🎈 TRACK RSVP 🥂 NO MORE STRESS 🎉
landing.fitur_dashboard_subjudul: Our advanced dashboard helps you manage your dream party effortlessly.
landing.dash_feat_1_desc: Manage guest lists and send instant invites via WhatsApp.
landing.dash_feat_2_desc: Track expenses and export to PDF or Excel format.
landing.dash_feat_3_desc: Organize your timeline and track all preparations.
landing.dash_feat_4_desc: Edit your invitation design directly from your phone with real-time preview.

buat_pesta.mode_dewasa_desc: For adult birthdays. Budget tracker, bar planner, and dress code features.
